qsforge.release_notes: Cache speedup. (1) Re-analysing a previously-analysed .rvt is now ~5 ms instead of 1–2 minutes — the cache-hit branch no longer re-runs trimesh DAE→GLB conversion when the GLB is already on disk. (2) Upgrading patch versions (1.0.x → 1.0.y) no longer invalidates all your existing caches; only major-version bumps do. Both fixes target the 'repeat analysis is still slow' regression reported on 1.0.2.

ddc.release_notes: DDC ships bundled inside the QSForge installer; no separate download yet.
